resources.string: No Recent Data
DMG
HEALS
CC
DPS
Heals
CC
5-Minute

The Lua Addon (dubbed the 'companion') provides additional functionality by loading a native Lua addon. This allows for native-only functionality like target-based debuff tracking, raid management, and in-game visual/audible effects. Without the companion some features won't work as intended. \n\nNote that: The "mark" features below are purely visual and do not automatically target or apply raid marks to targets.
Enable Lua Companion. (Disabling the addon will retract the Lua code from the game at the next character switch automatically!)
Display the main / co-raid member count when players join or leave the raid.
Display 'Charmed' targets in game chat window.
Display 'Silenced' targets in game chat window.
Show a [Heart Mark] over highest-value enemy healers. (Top 3 enemy healers based on cumulative PvP healing.)
Show a [Crossed-Swords Mark] over highest-value enemy DPS. (Top 3 enemy DPS based on cumulative PvP damage.)
Show a [Shield Mark] over high-value enemy CC mages to stay away from. (Top 3 enemy CC based on cumulative PvP crowd control time.)
Sheen a God ray over sacrifice dancers while they are channeling. (Easier to spot than default game effect.)
Show a [Purple Dot] over player's heads to indicate that they are Charmed.
Show a [Black Dot] over player's heads to indicate that they are Silenced.
Show a [Blue Dot] over player's heads to indicate that they are Distressed.
Raid Framer Desktop Settings
Data Sourcing
Please be careful to enter the correct ArcheRage directory below. This field may have been populated automatically.

Technically, you do not need ArcheRage installed if you only want to view historical combat.log files. Just right-click on the .log or .rf (battle slice export file) and choose 'Open-With → Raid Framer' in the Windows Explorer context menu to view a replay.
